name: Kent Gida Maddeleri Sanayii ve Ticaret A.S.
summary: Kent Gida Maddeleri Sanayii ve Ticaret A.S. manufactures and sells candies and sugar lozenges in Turkey and internationally. It offers chewing gums, biscuits, chocolate and cocoa products under the Jelibon, Olips, Missbon, Topitop, Kent, Tofita, First, Falim, Bubbaloo, Trident, Love is, Sipsevdi, Milka, Bonibon, Toblerone, Cadbury, and Oreo brands. The company was founded in 1927 and is headquartered in Gebze, Turkey. Kent Gida Maddeleri Sanayii ve Ticaret A.S. is a subsidiary of Cadbury Schweppes Overseas Limited.
